generated_for: hackathon demo - conflict-detection statute knowledge base
note: Public-law numbers/titles/policy areas were retrieved from the Congress.gov API v3. 'role' and 'conflict_note' are analytical annotations for the agent. laws.official_title: Dodd-Frank Wall Street Reform and Consumer Protection Act
laws.common_name: Dodd-Frank Wall Street Reform and Consumer Protection Act
related_rules: FDIC Assessments Thresholds, Rate Schedules, and Adjustments
FDIC Resolution Submissions Required for Covered Insured Depository Institutions
CFTC Data Reporting Requirements for Certain Event Contracts
laws.conflict_note: Sec. 331 redefined the FDIC assessment base; Sec. 165(d) created the resolution-plan regime; Title VII gave CFTC/SEC swap authority. Flag rules that deviate from or duplicate these mandates.

laws.official_title: An act to provide for reconciliation pursuant to title II of S. Con. Res. 14.
related_rules: Medicare Drug Price Negotiation Program and Medicare Prescription Drug Benefit Program
laws.conflict_note: Created Medicare drug-price-negotiation authority, carving out an exception to the 2003 MMA non-interference clause (42 U.S.C. 1395w-111(i)).

laws.official_title: Medicare Prescription Drug, Improvement, and Modernization Act of 2003
laws.common_name: Medicare Prescription Drug, Improvement, and Modernization Act of 2003 (MMA)
related_rules: Medicare Drug Price Negotiation Program and Medicare Prescription Drug Benefit Program
laws.conflict_note: Established the Part D 'non-interference clause' barring the HHS Secretary from negotiating drug prices; directly reversed by the 2022 IRA.

laws.official_title: Housing and Economic Recovery Act of 2008
laws.common_name: Housing and Economic Recovery Act of 2008 (HERA)
related_rules: FHFA Enterprise Duty To Serve Underserved Markets; Correction
laws.conflict_note: Created FHFA and the Duty-to-Serve mandate; flag corrections that narrow the statutorily required underserved-markets coverage.

related_rules: IRS Increase in Threshold for Requiring Information Reporting; wagering losses
laws.conflict_note: Lowered the 1099-K information-reporting threshold to $600; effectively reversed by the 2025 reconciliation act (PL 119-21).

laws.official_title: An act to provide for reconciliation pursuant to title II of H. Con. Res. 14.
laws.common_name: 2025 Reconciliation Act (One Big Beautiful Bill Act)
related_rules: IRS Increase in Threshold for Requiring Information Reporting; wagering losses
laws.conflict_note: Raises the information-reporting threshold and modifies the wagering-loss limitation; the IRS rule implements it, reversing ARPA 2021.
